text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Reassessment upon code green In Emergency Department for the appearance since yesterday morning of diffuse burning sensation on the skin of the trunk and limbs without any appearant skin rash; does not recall any triggering medications or foods.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "She took antihistamine without any improvement.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "This morning, the patient experienced chest pain, which she attributes to contracting all her muscles.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "The pain is continuous.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "She reports that she experienced similar symptoms during a previous suspected allergic reaction to Targin.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "Past Medical History: - previous motorcycle accidents with pnx, splenectomy, twice in coma (no documentation available) - smoker - arterial hypertension Therapy: perindopril ALLERGY TO SULFA DRUGS and suspected allergy to targin Alert, oriented, cooperative BP 180/100 mmHg HR 70/min r sat 98% on room air apyretic Cardiac examination: normal rhythmic tones Pulmonary examination: diffuse vesicular murmur Abdominal examination: palpable, not painful or tender no peripheral edema Neurological examination: isochoric, isocyclic, and normally reactive pupils, no cranial nerve deficits except for a subtle right facial deficit (which she reports as known, following previous zoster infection) mild erythematous rash on upper limbs ECG: SR HR 60/min regular PQ interval, repolarization within normal limits Already administered captopril 1 tablet and minias 10 drops Norvasc 5 mg 1 tablet bentelan 4 mg 1 tablet", 0.0, 1.0)
